% Plain TeX stress fixture — café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆
% Comments, control sequences, catcodes, conditionals, and persistent math states.
\catcode`\@=11
\catcode`\~=13
\catcode`\!=12
\chardef\bang=`\!
\mathchardef\alphaSlot="710B
\newcount\chaptercount
\newcount\itemcount
\newcount\scratchcount
\newdimen\pagewidth
\newdimen\gutter
\newskip\bodyglue
\newtoks\everycard
\chaptercount=7
\itemcount=13
\scratchcount=-2
\pagewidth=30pc
\gutter=1.5em
\bodyglue=6pt plus 2pt minus 1pt
\everycard={\message{shipping a card}}
\font\titlefont=cmr10 scaled 1440
\font\mathfont=cmmi10
\def\identity#1{#1}
\def\pair#1#2{(#1,#2)}
\def\swap#1#2{#2#1}
\def\firstoftwo#1#2{#1}
\def\secondoftwo#1#2{#2}
\long\def\paragraphmacro#1\par{\indent#1\par}
\outer\def\byeexample{\vfill\supereject}
\edef\frozenname{chapter-\the\chaptercount}
\xdef\globalname{item-\the\itemcount}
\let\savedrelax=\relax
\futurelet\nexttoken\savedrelax
\def\choose{\@ifnextchar[\choosewith\choosewithout}
\def\choosewith[#1]{\message{option=#1}}
\def\choosewithout{\message{no option}}
\choose[compact]
\choose
\csname frozen-\frozenname\endcsname
\expandafter\def\csname dynamic-control\endcsname{dynamic}
\begingroup
  \advance\chaptercount by 1
  \multiply\itemcount by 2
  \divide\itemcount by 3
  \global\scratchcount=99
\endgroup
\ifnum\chaptercount=7
  \message{chapter count retained}
\else
  \errmessage{unexpected chapter count}
\fi
\ifodd\itemcount
  odd item count
\else
  even item count
\fi
\ifdim\pagewidth>20pc
  wide measure
\else
  narrow measure
\fi
\ifx\savedrelax\relax
  equal meanings
\fi
\ifcat a b
  same category
\fi
\ifhmode horizontal\else not horizontal\fi
\ifmmode math\else text\fi
\ifvmode vertical\else not vertical\fi
\ifvoid255 empty box\else occupied box\fi
\unless\ifnum\scratchcount<0 nonnegative\fi
% An ignored region drives the grammar's multiline iffalse state.
\iffalse
  discarded words and \unknowncontrol
  {a discarded group begins
    {a nested discarded group
      with café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆}
    and the outer group ends}
  \ifnum\itemcount>0
    nested false-region conditional
    \ifodd\chaptercount
      deeper conditional text
    \else
      alternate deeper text
    \fi
  \fi
\fi
Visible text resumes after the false region.
\iffalse
  another skipped branch
\else
Visible else material is lexed at the root.
\fi
% Inline mathematics exercises constants, operators, braces, and delimiters.
Euler wrote $e^{i\pi}+1=0$ in a compact identity.
Fractions $\frac{a+b}{c-d}$ sit beside $x_1,x_2,\ldots,x_n$.
Delimiters $\left(\sum_{k=0}^{m} k^2\right)$ grow with content.
Relations $A\subseteq B$, $x\neq y$, and $u\mapsto v$ use named symbols.
Functions $\sin^2 t+\cos^2 t=1$ and $\log_{10}100=2$ are recognized.
Escapes \$ \% \# \& \_ \{ \} remain control symbols.
$$
  \sum_{n=1}^{10} n = \frac{10\cdot11}{2}
$$
Between displays, ordinary words and \emph{macro arguments} return to root.
$$
  \int_0^1 x^3\,dx = \frac14,
  \qquad \lim_{h\to0}\frac{(x+h)^2-x^2}{h}=2x
$$
The next display contains text nested inside math.
$$
  \left\{ z\in\mathbb{C}: |z|\leq 1 \right\}
  \quad\text{closed unit disk — café 東京}
$$
And a split display keeps the dollar state across several physical lines.
$$
  a_0 &= 1,\\
  a_{n+1} &= 2a_n+1,\\
  a_n &= 2^{n+1}-1.
$$
Single-dollar math may also span
$
  p(x)=x^4-2x^2+1
$
before text mode resumes.
\setbox0=\hbox{A horizontal box}
\setbox1=\vbox{\hsize=12pc A vertical box\par with two lines.}
\setbox2=\vtop{top-aligned material}
\wd0=8pc
\ht0=12pt
\dp0=3pt
\copy0 \box1 \unhbox2
\raise2pt\hbox{raised}
\lower1pt\hbox{lowered}
\kern.5em \hskip1em plus .5em \vskip6pt
\leaders\hbox{.}\hfill
\halign{\hfil#\hfil&\quad#\hfil\cr
  Name&Value\cr
  alpha&1\cr
  beta&2\cr}
\valign{\vfil#\vfil\cr
  first\cr
  second\cr}
\def\row#1&#2\cr{\hbox to 10pc{#1\hfil#2}\par}
\row left&right\cr
\insert\footins{\footnotesize A plain footnote insertion.}
\mark{chapter:\the\chaptercount}
\topmark \firstmark \botmark
\output={\shipout\box255\global\advance\pageno by 1}
\headline={\hfil Plain TeX stress \folio}
\footline={\hfil\tenrm\folio\hfil}
\parindent=18pt
\parskip=3pt plus 1pt
\leftskip=0pt plus 1fil
\rightskip=0pt plus 1fil
\spaceskip=.4em plus .2em minus .1em
\pretolerance=100
\tolerance=800
\hyphenpenalty=50
\clubpenalty=1000
\widowpenalty=1000
\brokenpenalty=100
\hyphenation{gram-mar lex-i-cal mul-ti-line}
\patterns{a1bc de2f}
\language=0
\lccode`\A=`\a
\uccode`\a=`\A
\sfcode`\.=3000
\delcode`\|="026A30C
\catcode`\?=12
\catcode`\:=12
\message{Registers: \the\chaptercount, \the\pagewidth}
\wlog{A diagnostic line for the transcript}
\immediate\write16{Immediate terminal output}
\openout1=fixture.aux
\write1{\string\record{\frozenname}}
\closeout1
\openin2=optional-input.tex
\ifeof2
  \message{input is absent or exhausted}
\else
  \read2 to \inputline
\fi
\closein2
\newread\datafile
\newwrite\logfile
\newif\ifready
\readytrue
\ifready
  \message{ready flag is true}
\else
  \message{ready flag is false}
\fi
\def\loopbody{\advance\scratchcount by -1 }
\loopbody\loopbody\loopbody
\number\scratchcount
\romannumeral\chaptercount
\string\identity
\meaning\pair
\jobname
\time \day \month \year
\hrule width 10pc height .4pt depth 0pt
\vrule width .4pt height 8pt depth 2pt
\noindent Final paragraph with café λ 東京 🚀 𝌆 and [balanced brackets].
\catcode`\@=12
\catcode`\~=12
\end
